member.name: T:ExStoreTest2025.Properties.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:ExStoreTest2025.Properties.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:ExStoreTest2025.Properties.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: T:ExStoreTest2025.Windows.MainWindow
member.summary: Interaction logic for MainWindow.xaml
MainWindow

member.name: M:ExStoreTest2025.Windows.MainWindow.InitializeComponent
member.summary: InitializeComponent

member.name: M:ShExStorageR.ShExStorage.ShExSchemaLibR`9.WriteSheet
member.summary:
save the sheet data and any row data to the model
return:
XRC_GOOD = worked / saved
XRC_FAIL = did not work (could not create a datastorage element

member.name: M:ShExStorageR.ShExStorage.ShExStorageLibR.GetAllDs
member.summary: Get all DataStorage's

member.name: M:ShExStorageR.ShExStorage.ShExStorageLibR.FindSheetDs(ShExStorageN.ShExStorage.ExId,Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.DataStorage@)
member.summary:
Get a DataStorage by its Exid
XRC_GOOD if found
XRC_FAIL if not

member.name: M:ShExStorageR.ShExStorage.ShExStorageLibR.DelDs(ShExStorageN.ShExStorage.ExId)
member.summary: Delete a DataStorage by its Exid

member.name: M:ShExStorageR.ShExStorage.ShExStorageLibR.DelDs(ShExStorageN.ShExStorage.ExId,Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.DataStorage)
member.summary: Delete a DataStorage by its ElementId

member.name: M:ShExStorageR.ShExStorage.ShExStorageLibR.DoesSheetDsExist(ShExStorageN.ShExStorage.ExId)
member.summary: Determine if the Ds, named in the Exid, exists

member.name: M:ShExStorageR.ShExStorage.ShExStorageLibR.CreateDataStorage(ShExStorageN.ShExStorage.ExId,Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.DataStorage@)
member.summary:
create the datastorage object with name from an ExId
XRC_GOOD = new ds created
XRC_DS_EXISTS = existing ds found
XRC_FAIL = no ds found and no ds created

member.name: M:ShExStorageR.ShExStorage.ShExStorageLibR.getDataStoreElements
member.summary: collect all datastore elements

member.name: M:ShExStorageR.ShExStorage.ShExStorageLibR.GetAllSchema(System.Collections.Generic.IList{Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.Schema}@)
member.summary:
Get all Schema's in memory (this crosses document boundaries)
IList is saved in DataStorageAdmin -> AllSchemas

member.summary: get all schemas from the entity

member.summary: Find a schema based on its Exid

member.summary: find a schema using a Guid or return null

member.summary: Determine if the sheet schema exists

member.summary: Determine if the lock schema exists

member.summary: get the Entity stored in the DataStorage

member.name: M:ShExStorageR.ShExStorage.ShExStorageLibR.GetEntityDataAsString(Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.Entity,Autodesk.Revit.DB.ExtensibleStorage.Field)
member.summary:
Get the raw value stored in the entity for the
schema field
member.param: The field for which to get the data
member.returns: The raw value as a string

member.name: M:ShExStorageR.ShExStorage.ShExStorageLibR.DoesSheetEntityExist(ShExStorageN.ShExStorage.ExId)
member.summary:
check if the sheet entity exists
true = found / false = not found

member.name: M:ShExStorageR.ShExStorage.ShExStorManagerR`9.ReadSheet
member.summary:
read the sheet data into a pre-initialized object
expectation is to do this once at the begining

member.name: M:UtilityLibrary.CsExtensions.IsVoid(System.String)
member.summary: true if string is null or whitespace false otherwise

member.name: T:UtilityLibrary.CsUtilities
member.summary:
Utilities - list of functions
nl - system new line
UserName - the user's login name
MachineName - the name of the machine
CompanyName - the name of the user's company (if any)
AssemblyName - the name of the assembly
AssemblyVersion - the version of the assembly
AssemblyDirectory - the directory of the assembly
CreateSubFolders - based a root path, create sub-folders based on an array
SubFolder - based on a root path, create a sub-folder path
ValidateStringChars - search the test string for "invalid" characters
ValidateChar - determine if the char is in a list of invalid char's
RandomString - create a random string of a defined length (do I need this?)
Extn: IndexOf(T Array) - get the index of an element in a generic array
INVALID_FILE_NAME_CHARACTERS - array of char that are not allowed in a file name
INVALID_FILE_NAME_STRING - string of characters that are not allowed in a file name

member.name: M:UtilityLibrary.CsUtilitiesMedia.GetBitmapImage(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Load an image from embeded resource [use GetBitmapImageResource instead]

member.name: M:UtilityLibrary.CsUtilitiesMedia.GetBitmapImageResource(System.String)
member.summary: get a BitmapImage from an assembly's resource cache (not from the embeded resource cache)
member.param:
The path to the image including a preceding slash
e.g. /folder/imagename.png

member.name: T:ShExStorageN.ShSchemaFields.DynaValue
member.summary:
store a value as one of these data types:
string, int, double, enum, Guid

member.name: F:ShExStorageN.ShSchemaFields.DynaValue.dynValue
member.summary: get the raw value stored

member.name: P:ShExStorageN.ShSchemaFields.DynaValue.LastValueReturnedIsValid
member.summary:
flag weather that the last GetValue() did
provide the actual value. doing this rather
than throw an exception

member.summary: get the data type

member.name: M:ShExStorageN.ShSchemaFields.DynaValue.GetValueAs``1
member.summary: get the value based on the type parameter
member.typeparam:
Data type to provide
possible: string, int, double, enum

member.summary: get the value as a string

member.summary: determine if the value is a string

member.summary: get the value as n int

member.name: P:ShExStorageN.ShSchemaFields.DynaValue.IsInt
member.summary: determine if the value is an int

member.summary: get the value as a double

member.name: P:ShExStorageN.ShSchemaFields.DynaValue.IsDouble
member.summary: determine if the value is a double

member.name: M:ShExStorageN.ShSchemaFields.DynaValue.AsBool
member.summary: get the value as a bool

member.name: M:ShExStorageN.ShSchemaFields.DynaValue.AsEnum
member.summary: determine if the value is a bool

member.name: M:ShExStorageN.ShSchemaFields.DynaValue.AsGuid
member.summary: return the value as a Guid if it is a Guid

member.name: T:ShExStorageN.ShSchemaFields.AShScFields`2
member.summary:
basic abstract class for either sheet or rows
has the basic collection of fields
includes some pre-defined routines

member.name: T:ShExStorageN.ShExStorage.ExId
member.summary:
creates / holds the Extended Storage Id - unique for the document
ExsId -> VendorId + '_' + DocName
DocName is "processed" to remove invalid characters
provides the schema names
sheet -> ExsId +'_'+"Sheet"

member.name: M:ShExStorageN.ShExStorage.ExId.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: ctor

member.name: P:ShExStorageN.ShExStorage.ExId.Document
member.summary: get the associated Document

member.name: M:ShExStorageN.ShExStorage.ExId.setDocument(System.String)
member.summary: assign the document name (revit model title).

member.name: P:ShExStorageN.ShExStorage.ExId.ExsId
member.summary: the Extended Storage Id -> VendorId + '_' + DocName

member.name: P:ShExStorageN.ShExStorage.ExId.ExsIdSheetDsName
member.summary: The sheet ex storage id

member.name: P:ShExStorageN.ShExStorage.ExId.ExsIdSheetSchemaName
member.summary: The sheet ex schema id (same as sheet id)

member.name: P:ShExStorageN.ShExStorage.ExId.ExsIdLockSchemaName
member.summary: The lock ex schema id (name)

member.name: P:ShExStorageN.ShExStorage.ExId.VendorId
member.summary: the vendor id

member.name: P:ShExStorageN.ShExStorage.ExId.CompanyId
member.summary: the company id

member.name: P:ShExStorageN.ShExStorage.ExId.DocumentName
member.summary: The raw document name - may have unaccepsheet characters and spaces

member.name: P:ShExStorageN.ShExStorage.ExId.DocName
member.summary: the "cleaned" document name - only has [0-9a-zA-Z]

member.summary: add all of the meta fields to a data field using default information
